steps.name: Given user goes to "insta-emi-card" page of "BFLHome" website
When user clicks on the inline video
When user closes the ad popup
Then user verifies BFLInstaEmiCard Inline player functions Play,Mute,Speed,Quality,Fullscreen,SeekToEnd,Replay,Forward,Rewind
